raw: {"perspective": "Ecosystem Auditor", "findings": [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "issue": "Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) is missing in all products except MindShift, violating Foundation Law 2 consistency requirement across all 5 products.", "recommended_fix": "Add Energy Adaptation framework to VOLAURA, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, and Atlas interfaces per Constitution v1.7; map energy-aware UX patterns in each."}, {"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "packages/swarm/autonomous_run.py", "issue": "Swarm code-index is stale (>7 days old), agents may be simulating without updated context.", "recommended_fix": "Update code-index from git history and trigger full re-index across all agents; validate against current repo state."}, {"severity": "P0", "file_or_area": "ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "issue": "Crystal Law 6 Amendment is cut off mid-sentence, creating ambiguity in badge-reward logic.", "recommended_fix": "Complete the amendment text based on recorded intent: 'A badge must never appear immediately after a contingent action'."}, {"severity": "P1", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/skills.py", "issue": "POST /api/skills/{name} lacks validation against Constitution laws, enabling non-compliant skill activation.", "recommended_fix": "Add pre-execution hook that checks skill output against Foundation Laws 1-5 and Crystal Economy Laws."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Cross-product inconsistency in Foundation Law 2 enforcement risks ecosystem integrity — Energy Adaptation missing in 4/5 products."}

findings.issue: Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) is missing in all products except MindShift, violating Foundation Law 2 consistency requirement across all 5 products.
findings.recommended_fix: Add Energy Adaptation framework to VOLAURA, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, and Atlas interfaces per Constitution v1.7; map energy-aware UX patterns in each.

findings.issue: Swarm code-index is stale (>7 days old), agents may be simulating without updated context.
findings.recommended_fix: Update code-index from git history and trigger full re-index across all agents; validate against current repo state.

findings.issue: Crystal Law 6 Amendment is cut off mid-sentence, creating ambiguity in badge-reward logic.
findings.recommended_fix: Complete the amendment text based on recorded intent: 'A badge must never appear immediately after a contingent action'.

findings.issue: POST /api/skills/{name} lacks validation against Constitution laws, enabling non-compliant skill activation.
findings.recommended_fix: Add pre-execution hook that checks skill output against Foundation Laws 1-5 and Crystal Economy Laws.

whistleblower_flag: Cross-product inconsistency in Foundation Law 2 enforcement risks ecosystem integrity — Energy Adaptation missing in 4/5 products.
